overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through the Watson district of Night City. The player moves from a shadowed underpass through neon-lit alleys with Japanese signage, past industrial ventilation systems, and down to a lower street level with police presence.

events.description: emerging from dark underpass into sunlit alley entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit concrete underpass toward the bright alley exit

entered.detail: large cylindrical support column for the overhead highway structure
piles of blue and white garbage bags scattered along the walkway
massive concrete overpass creating shadowed canopy overhead
blue neon sign with Japanese characters ホテル indicating hotel entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a shadowed concrete underpass beneath an elevated highway, littered with trash bags and debris. The camera moves forward through the dim corridor toward a brightly lit exit where neon signage becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial alley with Asian signage

events.description: entering the dense commercial alley with layered neon signage
navigating past pedestrians walking in opposing direction

agents.ego_description: walking through the bustling alley observing vibrant neon signs and street vendors

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera through the alley

entered.detail: large purple neon sign reading TENGU hanging above the alley
pink neon billboard with text WATSON WHORE on building facade
vertical red neon sign with Japanese characters ラーメン
traditional red spherical lanterns hanging from building overhangs
circular neon sign depicting pizza slice with green and red colors

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow commercial alley dense with cyberpunk neon signage including a prominent purple TENGU sign and pink Watson Whore billboard. The ground is littered with trash and a few pedestrians walk through the space between vending machines and storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial ventilation corridor with steam vents

events.description: passing large industrial ventilation fans emitting thick steam
moving into darker shadowed area with artificial neon lighting only

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the industrial corridor past massive ventilation systems

entered.detail: massive white circular ventilation fans mounted on the wall emitting steam
thick white steam venting from the industrial fan system
purple neon sign with KIROSHI text and Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The alley transitions to an industrial section featuring massive ventilation fans mounted on the right wall, actively emitting clouds of steam. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed, with the Kiroshi corporation sign visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with seating overlooking lower streets

events.description: exiting narrow alley into open sunlit plaza with benches
turning right toward stairway descending to lower street level

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza and descending stairs to lower street level

notable_agents.action: person wearing red beanie sitting on concrete bench

entered.detail: modern concrete seating structures in the plaza area
large colorful abstract graffiti art on building wall
concrete stairs with red railings leading down to lower level

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the enclosed alley into a sunlit elevated plaza with concrete benches where people are seated. The camera turns toward a stairway descending to a lower street level, passing colorful mural art on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower street level with police presence and vending machines

events.description: passing parked NCPD police car with flashing lights
walking close to biohazard truck temporarily blocking left side view

agents.ego_description: walking past the police car and vending machines along the lower street

notable_agents.action: parked NCPD police car with white and teal livery

entered.detail: white and teal police sedan with NCPD markings and roof lights
red vending machines with BURRITO XXL branding in a row
black truck with yellow biohazard symbol and warning stripes
Asian-style tiled roof overhang on building entrance

segments.scene_description: Descending to a lower street level featuring a parked NCPD police car and rows of Burrito XXL vending machines. The walkway continues under an overpass past a biohazard transport truck and traditional Asian architectural elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, concrete underpass into the vibrant, neon-drenched alleys of Watson before descending into a sunlit urban plaza. It begins in a shadowed corridor littered with debris, moving forward toward a bright exit where the dimness gives way to a narrow commercial alley filled with glowing purple and pink neon signage and scattered pedestrians. As the camera pushes deeper, the commercial vibrancy shifts into a darker industrial zone characterized by massive ventilation fans emitting clouds of steam beneath a Kiroshi corporation sign. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from the enclosure into a sunlit elevated plaza with concrete benches and colorful murals, before turning toward a stairway. Finally, the camera descends to a lower street level, passing a parked NCPD police car and Burrito XXL vending machines as it continues under an overpass past a biohazard transport truck.
